html:
{% for bundle_row in doc.table_bundle_details %} {% set parent_item = frappe.get_doc("Bundle Creation Item", bundle_row.parent_item_id) %}
Bundle Order No: {{ doc.name }}
Date: {{ frappe.format_date(doc.posting_date or doc.creation, "dd-MMM-yyyy") }} Bundle Number: {{ bundle_row.bundle_id }}
Cut Docket Number: {{ doc.cut_docket_id or "" }} Size: {{ parent_item.size }}
Colour: {{ doc.color or "" }} Bundle Qty: {{ bundle_row.unitsbundle }}
Roll No: {{ parent_item.roll_no or "" }} Plies: {{ bundle_row.ply or "" }}
Shade: {{ bundle_row.shade or "" }}
Component: {{ bundle_row.component }}
Sales Order: {{ parent_item.sales_order or "" }}
Line Item No: {{ parent_item.line_item_no or "" }}
Work Order: {{ parent_item.work_order or "" }}
{% endfor %}
name: Bundle Details - QR Code
